justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial preference for 'around 9 AM tomorrow' and then accurately understood the follow-up request for 'later in the morning' on the same day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's preferred time was unavailable, offering a reasonable range of options without repeating previously rejected times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and proceeded to check availability and book the appointment without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment without any friction points or exposure to technical jargon.
